mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time FROM user_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time FROM user_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND config_key IN
#{key}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_config (user_id, config_key, config_value, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE user_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, description = #{description}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND config_key = #{key}
